title: chrysanthemum mairei
intro: Chrysanthemum mairei, also known as the Maire's chrysanthemum, is a flowering plant species native to China and Taiwan, characterized by its showy white flowers and yellow centers. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce fever and relieve headaches. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum mairei include its ability to improve eye health, reduce stress, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Chrysanthemum mairei is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a dried flower or in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal decoction.
